summary: Iteration 11 - Tested 4 NEW modules: Revenue Management, Analytics & Reporting, Audit/Security, HotelRunner Integration. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages render correctly with full feature visibility.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified 4 NEW modules: (1) Revenue Management - /revenue page with KPI cards, 5 room type selector, pricing calendar, 30-day forecast, dynamic pricing engine working, (2) Analytics - /analytics page with KPIs, revenue trend (7d/30d/90d), booking sources, room performance, occupancy heatmap for 2026, (3) Audit/Security - /audit page with logs, alerts, overview tabs, security check button, KVKK masking, (4) HotelRunner - /hotelrunner page with mock mode status, 3 sync feature cards, sync logs table, configuration section. All APIs tested and working.

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/revenue/room-types - Returns 5 room types with base prices
GET /api/revenue/pricing/calculate - Returns dynamic price with season/occupancy/demand/day/special factors
GET /api/revenue/pricing/calendar - Returns price calendar with min/max/avg summary
GET /api/revenue/kpi - Returns ADR, RevPAR, occupancy rate, revenue
GET /api/revenue/forecast - Returns 30-day forecast with daily predictions
POST /api/revenue/pricing/update-all - Updates prices for configurable days ahead

frontend_elements.kpi_cards: 4 cards - Toplam Gelir, Doluluk Orani, ADR, RevPAR
frontend_elements.room_type_selector: 5 buttons with room type names and base prices in TL
frontend_elements.pricing_calendar: Monthly view with daily dynamic prices, percentage changes, min/max/avg stats
frontend_elements.forecast: 30-day revenue forecast with total and daily average

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/analytics/dashboard/kpi - Returns daily_revenue, occupancy_rate, adr, revpar with trends
GET /api/analytics/revenue/trend - Returns 7d/30d/90d revenue data with total/average
GET /api/analytics/bookings/sources - Returns booking source distribution with percentages
GET /api/analytics/occupancy/heatmap - Returns 12-month heatmap with occupancy levels
GET /api/analytics/rooms/performance - Returns room-level revenue and occupancy

frontend_elements.kpi_cards: 4 cards with trends (up/down arrows) - Gunluk Gelir, Doluluk Orani, ADR, RevPAR
frontend_elements.revenue_trend: Bar chart with period selectors (7 Gun, 30 Gun, 90 Gun)
frontend_elements.room_performance: List showing room revenue and occupancy rates

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/audit/logs - Returns paginated audit logs
GET /api/audit/stats - Returns total_logs, success_rate, action_counts, entity_counts
GET /api/audit/alerts - Returns security alerts
POST /api/audit/check-security - Runs security check and creates alerts if needed

frontend_elements.stats_cards: 4 cards - Toplam Log, Basari Orani, Basarisiz Islem, Aktif Uyari
frontend_elements.logs_table: Table with Zaman, Islem, Varlik, Kullanici, IP, Durum columns
frontend_elements.alerts_section: Shows active alerts or 'Sistem guvenli gorunuyor' message
frontend_elements.overview: Islem Dagilimi and Varlik Dagilimi charts

security_features.kvkk_masking: Sensitive fields (password, credit_card, phone, email) masked

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/hotelrunner/status - Returns mock_mode=true, connection status
GET /api/hotelrunner/config - Returns features, sync interval, API key status
POST /api/hotelrunner/sync/full - Performs full sync (mock)
POST /api/hotelrunner/sync/reservations - Syncs reservations (mock)
POST /api/hotelrunner/sync/availability - Syncs availability (mock)
POST /api/hotelrunner/sync/rates - Syncs rates (mock)
GET /api/hotelrunner/sync-logs - Returns sync log history

frontend_elements.api_key_warning: Instructions for adding HOTELRUNNER_API_KEY and HOTELRUNNER_HOTEL_ID
frontend_elements.sync_logs_table: Table showing Zaman, Tip, Durum, Islenen, Mod columns
frontend_elements.config_section: Shows Senkronizasyon Araligi (5 dk), API Anahtari (Eksik), Hotel ID (Eksik), Mod (Mock)

mocked_features.note: HotelRunner sync endpoints return mock data since no API keys are configured. Real sync will work when HOTELRUNNER_API_KEY and HOTELRUNNER_HOTEL_ID are set in backend .env
